type: Publication-Ready Line Chart（学术出版级折线图，log–log）
goal: 生成 scaling law 风格训练曲线图：x 为 log10(compute in FLOP), y 为 log10(test cross-entropy), 2–3 model families with different markers, shaded ±std band (illustrative)

title.text: Scaling Laws for Language Model Pretraining (illustrative)

x_axis.label: log₁₀(Training compute C) [FLOP]
x_axis.scale: linear tick positions representing log units 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23

y_axis.label: log₁₀(Test cross-entropy, bits per character proxy)
y_axis.scale: linear from 0.35 to 0.7 on plot (representing log-scale loss)

series.name: MoE 8x routing (gated FFN)
series.points_illustrative: sits below dense line at same compute in mid-range

annotations.power_law: Dashed line segment along straight region labeled L ∝ C^{−a} (qualitative, exponent not numerically exact)
annotations.inset: optional tiny box: 'IsoFLOP snapshot at C=1e22' with two Pareto points (illustrative)

legend.position: lower left inside plot, frame off

caption.label: Figure 2.
caption.text: Empirical test loss as a function of training compute. Curves are stylized; actual measurements require fixed datasets and multiple seeds. Shaded band: ±1 std over seeds (illustrative).

must_keep: log-scale axes clearly labeled, not a false linear claim
line styles differ by model family
avoid: pretending y-values are from a specific paper’s raw logs
